title: M ETHOD   OF   C ONSTRUCTION 1. Connect switches S 1   and S 2   in parallel (See Fig. 30).
subject: Mathematics
activityTitle: M ETHOD   OF   C ONSTRUCTION 1. Connect switches S 1   and S 2   in parallel (See Fig. 30).
objective:
To obtain truth values of compound
statements of the type   p   q ∧   by using
switch connections in series.
Switches, electric wires, battery and
lamp/bulb.
observation:
1. If S 1   is on, truth value of   p   is _______________.
If S 1   is off, truth value of   p   is _______________.
If S 2   is on, truth value of   q   is _______________.
If S 2   is off, truth value of   q   is _______________.
2. If S 1   is on, S 2   is off, truth value of   p   q ∨   is ________.
If S 1   is on, S 2   is on, truth value of   p   q ∨   is ________.
If S 1   is off, S 2   is off, truth value of   p   q ∨   is ________.
If S 1   is off, S 2   is on, truth value of   p   q ∨   is ________.
If S 1   is _____, S 2   is ____, truth value of   p   q ∨   is T.
discussion:
This activity helps in understanding truth values of the statements   p   q ∨   in
different cases of the statements   p   and   q .
p   q ∨
